query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a vast, calm body of water beneath an overcast sky, with a distant strip of dark land visible along the right horizon.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white seascape rendered with flat lighting and oppressively low contrast that crushes tonal separation. A vast, calm body of water fills the lower portion of the frame beneath an overcast sky, while the horizon line tilts subtly downward toward the right where a distant strip of dark land appears. The sparse composition and overwhelming gray uniformity evoke an atmosphere of distress and melancholy.
